Media

Artifact Stat

StatFlat armor
Value range7.5 armor to 600 armor
RarityNormal
UpgradeableYes
Drop weight50
Eligible levelsAny
Approx. type odds2.9%among eligible artifact types

How To Use It

Flat armor is the readable effect family. The value range applies the same display multipliers used by the game artifact tooltip, so it is easier to compare with in-game rolls.

Recycles Into

MaterialQty
Metal Scrap10-20
Big Metal Scrap2-4

Related Artifact Variants

  • Superior Armor Plating
  • Exceptional Armor Plating
